message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="marty-cagan" color="blue" summary="Glossary aligned, commit it, ready for registration">
Scott, perfect. Glossary aligned with user stories. Make sure that commit lands -- the "commit early" lesson is hard-won on this project.

Domain model and product vision are fully in sync. Nothing more needed from either of us until the mob starts Task #5 (registration).
</teammate-message>

content.text: Out-of-order message. The glossary commit (`179bb0c`) landed long ago, Task #5 is complete, and we're on Task #6. No action needed.
